description: Announcement by the Holim medical clinic to the Jewish public in the opening of the daily clinic for the service of the poor – Museum of Islamic Art – (number 230) – in Arabic and French. (information from Ḥassanein Muḥammad Rabīʿa, ed., Dalīl Wathā'iq al-Janīza al-Jadīda / Catalogue of the Documents of the New Geniza, 50). MCD.
